$comment: C11/C23 6.4.5 (Cycle C) surrogate-pair witness: the RAW astral u"😀" (U+1F600, bytes F0 9F 98 80) under char16_t now encodes as the UTF-16 surrogate pair 0xD83D 0xDE00 (was H_WideCharSurrogateUnsupported before this cycle). p[0]==0xD83D && p[1]==0xDE00 && p[2]==0 ? 42 : 1. Red-on-disable: revert the encodeCodepoint U16 astral branch and this stops compiling. Runs on all 4 targets + the release arm.
